world.title: Aftershock frays nerves as many Venezuelans left to fend for themselves
world.summary: In areas devastated by the twin earthquakes, people are using crowbars, pickaxes and their bare hands to try to reach survivors.

world.title: Parcel bomb injures Ukrainian oligarch and family in Monaco - reports
world.summary: The blast was caused by an explosive device which appeared to contain bolts and pellets, the head of Monaco's government said.

world.title: Founder of Asian super-app Gojek sentenced to 10 years in jail for corruption

world.title: Angry Venezuelans accuse government of negligence over earthquake response
world.summary: People in areas devastated by twin earthquakes say they need more support from the government.

tech.title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
tech.summary: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

tech.title: Chamath Palihapitiya raises $135M Series A for his AI coding startup, takes CEO role
tech.summary: VCs remain thirsty to fund AI coding startups. This one, founded by investor Chamath Palihapitiya, is no exception.

tech.title: Vibe coding platform Base44 launches own model as AI startups seek defensibility
tech.summary: Wix-owned vibe coding platform Base44 has started rolling out its own AI model — with hopes that it will eventually outperform frontier models.

tech.title: Watch out, Amazon: The Kobo eReader now has a Goodreads rival
tech.summary: Kobo users can now automatically sync their reading progress to StoryGraph, making it easier to track books, reading stats, and challenges without relying on Amazon’s Goodreads.

tech.title: The AI jobs debate just got messier
tech.summary: A new report finds "high-intensity AI adopters” saw headcount increase 10.2%. Among those companies, entry-level headcount rose by 12%, countering the rhetoric that AI kills junior jobs.
